tagline: Dashboard schedule fix: Resolved an issue where schedules for dashboards published with global filters were not executing.
what_it_does: Dashboard schedule fix: Resolved an issue where schedules for dashboards published with global filters were not executing. Cross filtering fix for histograms: Fixed an issue where cross filtering with histograms did not work on large datasets.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Dashboard schedule fix: Resolved an issue where schedules for dashboards published with global filters were not executing. Cross filtering fix for histograms: Fixed an issue where cross filtering with histograms did not work on large datasets.
key_takeaway: Dashboard schedule fix: Resolved an issue where schedules for dashboards published with global filters were not executing.
